description:
Overview:

The battery version has a built-in 1000mAh rechargeable battery, which can realize portable wireless humidification. the USB version does not contain a battery;
The spray direction can be adjusted by 90° up and down;
Ultrasonic silent humidification, fine fog and non-wetting desktop, with colorful night light function, light color can be fixed;
Two spray modes: continuous spray/intermittent spray, suitable for home, office, bedroom, living room, car, etc.


Specifications:

Applicable area: less than 10 square meters
Water tank capacity: less than 1 liter
Applicable object: Household
Function: Humidification
Number of fog outlets: 1
Operation mode: mechanical
Timing function: 2-8 hours
Water shortage and power failure protection: Support
Power supply mode: USB
Shape: Cylindrical
Noise: 36dB or less
Rated voltage: 5 (V)
Rated power: 2-4 (W)
Color: white, green, coral
Product specifications: humidifier usb


Package Content:

Humidifier*1, power cord*1, manual*1
